disclaimer: Engineering-evidence readiness score. NOT a financial or market valuation. Manually reviewed; recalculated from repository evidence at the baseline commit, not copied from any prior conversation.

reassessments.reason: Operator chain-of-title attestation (EV-17, class operator_attested) narrows uncertainty — intended personal ownership, sole human contributor, AI-tool disclosure, personal account control — but attestation is not verified documentary evidence, so no dimension gains points. IP cap remains; infrastructure remains capped (still no real deployment); product/business remain limited (still no market evidence). Change class: changed risk estimate + evidence clarification, not value creation.

score_caps_applied.triggered_by: IP ownership not independently verified. M17D: personal ownership is operator_attested (EV-17 — intended founder ownership, sole human contributor, AI provenance disclosed) but the documentary package and professional review do not exist, so the cap stands. Repository license posture is a separate, also-open question (R-13) and is not evidence for or against ownership.
score_caps_applied.note: Raw total 59 already below the cap; cap documented because it binds any future uplift until ownership is evidenced.

score_caps_applied.triggered_by: No successful real deployment (local production-shaped rehearsals only)
